title: No Display Character
text: No Display Character This property specifies the ASCII character to be displayed when text is entered that should not be echoed, for example, in a password field. Description This property is only relevant when the Field Syntax definition includes NDI. Enter the decimal value of the ASCII character to be displayed as text is entered or click ... to select a character. The specified character you enter here is the character that Uniface echoes to the edit box instead of the entered text. The default value is a bullet (decimal 165). Applies To EditBox urtfeditbox (RichEditBox) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
